name: Metrics Overview Dashboard
description: Top-level observability dashboard with KPI summaries, real-time charts, and service health maps. Primary entry point for platform-wide metrics monitoring.

page_briefs.overview: Full-width dashboard behind a persistent sidebar. Top row of large KPI cards shows request rate, error rate, p99 latency, and uptime. Below, a responsive chart grid renders time-series panels for throughput, latency percentiles, and error budget burn. Bottom section displays a service health grid with color-coded tiles indicating each service's current status.
page_briefs.service-detail: Drill-down view for a single service. Compact KPI strip across the top shows service-specific request count, error percentage, and SLO compliance. Chart grid below visualizes latency distribution, throughput over time, and saturation signals. A radial usage meter on the right summarizes CPU, memory, and network utilization at a glance.
